# Resume Skeleton - Copilot Instructions

## Language Preferences

When working with TypeScript/JavaScript files in this project:

1. **Comments**: Always convert English comments to Traditional Chinese (繁體中文)
2. **Code style**: Maintain existing code conventions
3. **Variable names**: Keep English variable names unchanged - only convert comments

## When to Apply

- ALL new code comments should be written in Traditional Chinese
- When refactoring or adding to existing files, convert any remaining English comments to Traditional Chinese
- This applies to all files in `src/` directory and related TypeScript files

## Examples

❌ Incorrect:
```typescript
// Get the initial language
const lang = this.getInitialLanguage();
```

✅ Correct:
```typescript
// 取得初始語言
const lang = this.getInitialLanguage();
```
